free_text: Structures in the excitation functions for compound
MP Tandem van de Graaff accelerator
The targets were prepared by depositing C-14 on nickel
backing. After removal of the nickel backing with
S-32 and Si-28, 2-3% O-16 and 55% C-12. The total
target thickness was 65 mug/cm**2. A thinner target of
30 mug/cm**2 thickness were used at incident energies
below 11 MeV, but it soon broke with a beam current of
80 nA. At 12 MeV the target thickness of 65 mug/cm**2
corresponds to an energy loss of 400 keV in lab. system
protons were identified using a counter telescope of
two counters with 72 and 2000 mu thickness.
.The error is reported by authors on fig.
the sum of all alpha-channel with 6.81-8.07 MeV
excitation energy of the residual Ne-22 nucleus
